case_title: DEL CURTO PROPERTIES VS. RALPH MICK et al

docket_entries.description: STIPULATION FPOR ENTRY OF JUDGMENT UPON A BREACH FILED BY PLAINTIFF DEL CURTO PROPERTIES

UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF DEL CURTO PROPERTIES AS TO DEFENDANT MICK, RALPH SUTTON, DENNIS DOES 1 TO 10 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
DECLARATION OF JEFFREY MARGULIES UPON A BREACH FILED BY PLAINTIFF DEL CURTO PROPERTIES
